overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban street at night, approaching a CIRRUS COLA food stall, interacting with the vendor, and continuing down the street. The environment features towering buildings with massive digital billboards, palm trees, and futuristic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit commercial street at night, passing palm trees and massive digital billboards. The CIRRUS COLA food stall becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches.

segments.scene_description: The character enters the CIRRUS COLA food stall area, approaching the service counter where a vendor is working. The space is illuminated by the stall's neon signage and menu screens, with the character stopping to interact at the counter.

segments.scene_description: The character exits the food stall, passing the metal fence with red warning triangles, and returns to the sidewalk. A green sports car drives past on the street as the character walks away from the stall area.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the illuminated street away from the food stall

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down the neon-lit street, moving away from the CIRRUS COLA stall. The street is lined with metal fencing and towering buildings displaying bright digital advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk street that leads into a food stall interaction before returning to the urban sprawl. It begins with the character walking past palm trees and massive digital billboards, steadily approaching a CIRRUS COLA food stall visible in the distance. As the character enters the stall area, the environment shifts to the glow of neon signage and menu screens while they stop to interact with the vendor at the service counter. The scene then opens back up as the character exits past a metal fence with red warning triangles, just as a green sports car drives past on the street. Finally, the camera follows the character moving away from the stall and back down the sidewalk, flanked by towering buildings and bright digital advertisements.
